title: New DHS Secretary Calls for Quieter, Lower-Profile ICE Enforcement
detail: Newly confirmed DHS Secretary called for a strategic shift toward quieter, lower-profile immigration enforcement operations — alarming segments of the MAGA base who demand high-visibility crackdowns. The directive signals internal GOP tension over the administration's immigration posture, with hardliners pushing back against a perceived softening of enforcement optics even as deportation numbers remain elevated.

media.caption: New DHS Secretary calls for lower-profile immigration enforcement amid MAGA pushback
